{"id":"project-LICHEN-6mka.2","title":"All impls: SF assignment and multi-SF gateway","description":"Implement SF assignment and multi-SF gateway reception.

## Node behavior
1. Parse ASSIGNED_SF from DIO (or compute from IID hash)
2. All TX uses assigned SF
3. RX listens on assigned SF only
4. Cross-SF traffic: route via gateway

## Gateway behavior
1. Multi-SF RX: listen on all SFs
2. Single radio option: CAD scan across SFs
3. Multi-radio option: one radio per SF (or SF pair)
4. SF load tracking for assignment decisions
5. Cross-SF relay: receive on src_sf, transmit on dst_sf

## Python
- Add assigned_sf to node state
- Gateway sim: multi-SF RX model

## Rust
- SF assignment in join flow
- Gateway multi-SF support

## Zephyr
- Kconfig: CONFIG_LICHEN_SF_ASSIGNMENT_ENABLED
- Kconfig: CONFIG_LICHEN_GATEWAY_MULTI_SF (for gateway builds)
- Radio driver: SF switching for CAD scan","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-16T18:22:36.806917Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-16T18:22:36.806917Z","labels":["python","rust","zephyr","implementation","phy","scalability"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-6mka.2","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-6mka","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-16T18:22:36.965638Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-6mka.2","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-6mka.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-07-16T18:22:37.091779Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}
